summary: Tested profile picture and company logo upload feature along with premium social icons on public profile. All backend APIs pass (8/8 tests). Frontend UI working correctly with Photos section, upload areas, and SVG brand icons.
passed_tests: POST /api/user/upload-photo?photo_type=profile_picture - uploads image and returns URL (200)
POST /api/user/upload-photo?photo_type=company_logo - uploads image and returns URL (200)
Uploaded files accessible via returned URL
GET /api/user/profile - returns profile_picture and company_logo fields
User profile page shows PHOTOS section with Profile Picture and Company Logo upload areas
Profile picture upload area has data-testid='profile-picture-upload' and is clickable
Company logo upload area has data-testid='company-logo-upload' and is clickable
File inputs (2) are present and triggered on click
Public profile displays profile picture with data-testid='profile-picture'
Public profile displays company logo with data-testid='company-logo'
Public profile shows 7 social links with SVG brand icons (LinkedIn, Instagram, X/Twitter, YouTube, Facebook, WhatsApp, Website)
All social icons use proper brand SVG paths
Contact phone and email displayed on public profile
Save Contact button present for vCard download
seed_data_creation: Test profile picture and company logo already uploaded to test user via API (1x1 pixel PNG test images)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo upload feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint POST /api/user/upload-photo accepts file and photo_type query param (profile_picture or company_logo). Files stored in /app/backend/uploads/users/ and served via /api/uploads/users/. User profile page has PHOTOS section at top with clickable upload areas. Public profile at /profile/{userId} displays both photos and 7 social links with premium SVG brand icons. All data-testid attributes in place for testing.
